title: Peruvian-Style Lomo Saltado
description: A classic Peruvian stir-fry dish made with beef strips, onions, tomatoes, and french fries, served with rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of Peruvian xtra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the sliced beef strips and cook until they are browned and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the French fries and cook until they are crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the melted butter and stir-fry seasoning, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning with salt as needed.
Serve hot over a bed of rice.
If using fish fillets, cook in a separate pan with a little oil until cooked through.
